name: River Tech
longBusinessSummary: River Tech p.l.c., a technology company, provides software solutions. The company offers B2B technology products, as well as secure and tailormade solutions for the delivery of services in the online sphere. It engages in the licensing of a remote gaming software; and provision of IT and infrastructure support, management and consultancy, and maintenance and support services. The company was incorporated in 2017 and is based in St. Julian's, Malta.
